name: Aella Credit

name: BetaStore, Beta Store
description: Operator of a B2B marketplace intended to connect informal retailers directly with wholesalers and manufacturers. The company's platform helps small retailers source their inventory, and access financing, and essential insurance services, helping retailers to streamline their digital procurement and financing.

name: Boon
description: Boon is the world’s most agile referral hiring platform that scales across your entire community to deliver better hires, faster.

name: Cadana
description: Developer of an instant pay platform designed to help workers get paid on demand. The company's platform offers facilities like instant transfers and flexible destination options and allows users to pay for any unexpected expenses, enabling companies to hire and pay people.

name: EZ Farming
description: Operator of a farm acceleration digital platform intended to offer agricultural investment opportunities connecting small farmers with industrial investors. The company's platform seeks to pull investments from within the continent and the Diaspora to transform small farms into commercial sizes and empower youths in agriculture by equipping the next generation of farmers, enabling smallholder farmers to finance their businesses fast and find produce buyers.

name: Flex
description: Developer of a spend management platform designed to help small and medium-sized enterprises to manage and track expenses. The company's platform provides an intuitive user interface, insights, digital requisitions, bulk payment transfers, budgeting, and expense tracking, enabling businesses to digitize their daily operations.

name: KaliSpot
description: FinTech on a mission to bridge the gap between Physical & Digital Cash in West, Central & North Africa.

name: Pariti
description: Developer of a talent network platform intended to connect businesses in emerging markets with talent. The company's marketplace connects startups, capital, and global experts in emerging markets, and provides advisory and consulting services, enabling startups to hire new talent and raise capital.

name: Smile Identity
description: Developer of an identity management platform designed to monitor customer records easily. The company's platform includes a neutral network of image recognition algorithms and a turnkey service for any bank, telecom, or application-based service that needs remote biometric enrollment, ID validation, and authentication with no special hardware, enabling companies to scale rapidly by confirming the true identity of their users in real time, using any smartphone or computer.

name: Stitch
description: Operator of a financial API platform intended to securely link bank accounts with a lightweight single sign-on experience. The company's platform connects directly to the existing infrastructure of banks for seamless integration with compliance, enabling clients to have a seamless user experience, one-click, fraud-free bank payments and easy access to financial data.

name: ShiftSouth
description: Operator of an online platform intended to offer on-demand and regular home cleaning services. The company's platform presents users with a convenient way to book home cleaning, gardening and pool cleaning, heavy lifting, fixing and maintenance, and commercial sanitation services online from a phone, tablet, or computer, enabling clients to find suitable pre-vetted professionals in minutes.

name: Tripitaca
description: Operator of a digital platform intended to assist small tourism businesses in Africa. The company's platform allows hosts to create their packages and sell directly to travelers eliminating the need for agents and middlemen, enabling businesses to have a platform that notifies them when travellers are looking for properties which increases their chances of getting booked.

name: Payment24
description: Provider of a fuel payment and fleet management system created for fleet management. The company's fleet management system integrates into gas stations and vehicles, enabling fleet owners and managers to reduce fraud and increase efficiencies.

name: Jeeran
description: Provider of an online review management platform intended to bring the culture of reviews to the emerging world, empower individuals and enrich online local content. The company's online review management platform includes a million places listed from ten cities generating tens of thousands of reviews, enabling users users to interact better with places in their cities.

name: ShopGo
description: Provider of software platform designed to create e-commerce Websites. The company's software platform provides local support to its merchants and their changing needs at every stage, enabling merchants to succeed in their online business.

name: Melltoo
description: TAKADAO offers a platform for halal takaful powered by the blockchain, creating an insurance alternative for the new, global age. For the first time, this allows Muslims from all over the world to access value aligned, transparent insurance at a never-before-possible scale.

name: Julu Mobile
description: Owner and operator of a mobile advertising platform. The comapny uses mobile interaction information of users to send them relevant offers.

name: OneKitchen
description: Provider of shared kitchen solutions. The company provides tailored spaces for dark kitchens to operate and allows chefs to launch and sell on delivery platforms within days, allowing chefs and restaurant owners to launch their new restaurant from scratch, fine-tune their menu, optimize their operations and maximize their sales.

name: Ajar Online
description: Provider of a cloud based property management platform intended to offer a quick and secure online rent collection process. The company's platform uses property management tools, enabling tenants to pay their rent online, at any time and anywhere via SMS and email in less than 60 seconds.
